jd_text: Role Purpose The PMO Lead provides the operational backbone for marketing and events programmes, ensuring delivery discipline, transparency, and control across timelines, budgets, vendors, and risks. Programme Governance Own master timelines across campaigns, activations, and events Manage delivery frameworks, milestones, and dependencies Maintain a central risk and issue register with mitigation plans Financial & Vendor Oversight Track budgets against forecasts and actuals Govern vendor milestones and contractual deliverables Flag variances early and recommend corrective actions Reporting & Communication Produce a weekly executive dashboard covering timeline, budget, and risks Lead cross-team reporting and alignment forums Act as the single source of truth for programme status Scope & Boundaries Focused on control, coordination, and assurance Qualifications Required 8–12 years of experience in marketing operations, program management, or PMO roles Proven experience managing large-scale marketing campaigns and events portfolios Experience working with cross-functional teams, agencies, and external vendors Prior exposure to government, real estate, hospitality, or large-scale ecosystems is preferred Demonstrated experience in PMO setup, governance, and process standardization
